mapper.select: /** UsptExpertClDao.selectExpertClfcTreeList */ with recursive uspt_expert_cl_tree as ( select g.expert_cl_id , g.parnts_expert_cl_id , g.expert_cl_nm , g.sort_ordr_no , 0 AS level , array['1'||LPAD(CAST(g.sort_ordr_no AS TEXT), 3, '0')] as path , false AS cycle from uspt_expert_cl g where g.parnts_expert_cl_id IS NULL and g.enabled = true union all select e.expert_cl_id , e.parnts_expert_cl_id , e.expert_cl_nm , ut.level + 1 AS level , e.sort_ordr_no , ut.path||cast((ut.level + 1) as text)||lpad(cast(e.sort_ordr_no as text), 3, '0') as path , cast((ut.level + 1) as text)||lpad(cast(e.sort_ordr_no as text), 3, '0') = any(path) as cycle from uspt_expert_cl_tree ut inner join uspt_expert_cl e on ut.expert_cl_id = e.parnts_expert_cl_id and e.enabled = true ) select expert_cl_id , parnts_expert_cl_id -- , expert_cl_nm , lpad('', level) || expert_cl_nm as expert_cl_nm , sort_ordr_no , level , path , cycle from uspt_expert_cl_tree order by path

/** UsptExpertClDao.selectList */ select expert_cl_id , parnts_expert_cl_id , expert_cl_nm , sort_ordr_no , enabled , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_expert_cl where parnts_expert_cl_id = #{expertClId}

/** UsptExpertClDao.selectParntsExpertClIdList */ select a.parnts_expert_cl_id , b.expert_cl_nm from ( select parnts_expert_cl_id from uspt_expert_cl where parnts_expert_cl_id is not null group by parnts_expert_cl_id ) a inner join uspt_expert_cl b on a.parnts_expert_cl_id = b.expert_cl_id order by a.parnts_expert_cl_id
